must_detect.matched_text: Escalations should go to pit.office@nivyattech.in and the DPO; maintain an Insider List per SEBI guidance, with role-only entries (e.g., CFO) until named appointments are confirmed.

For vendor onboarding of Shreya Data Services LLP (GSTIN: 29AAECN8234D1Z5), collect PAN and bank/UPI solely for invoicing; store per DPDPA purpose and retention limitations.
Director verification: Mr. Rohan Mehta — P A N : Q J T P K 1 2 3 4 L; company PAN on file: AAZCN5932Q; vendor UPI ID for payouts: shreya.m@fyoubank.
Note: Aadhaar is not mandatory for service vendors; if provided by Mr. Devansh Iyer (Aadhaar 2341 2341 2346, masked in system), hash and tokenise; do not collect 0000 0000 0000 (example only).
Travel compliance: employee passport recorded for visa letter as Z7 65 43 21 (OCR copy reads Z7654321); residence address verified via utility bill only, not via geolocation.
Children’s data: for campus interns under 18 years, obtain guardian consent before any Aadhaar or PAN; otherwise, collect email/mobile only with age-gating and delete on exit.
Access link for KYC upload: https://compliance.nivyattech.in/dp?pan=QJTPK1234L&mobile=%2B91-9876543210&consent=true (never share via public channels).
SEBI (PIT) controls: treat plant utilisation projections and unpublished order book as UPSI; trading window to close 3 days before Board, pre-clearance by the CFO/Company Secretary, no WhatsApp forwarding.
Analyst management: only sanitized, public information (e.g., exchange-filings archive) may be discussed; press releases and investor presentations are public and not UPSI.
Public helplines like 100/101/108 and generic toll-free 1800-000-0000 appear in visitor logs but are not personal data and should be excluded from PII flags.
Form templates may show placeholders such as Name: ______, PAN: ______, Address: ______; these labels are not identifiers unless populated.
Security note: this is not a MAC address aa-bb-cc-dd-ee-ff, and not a device ID; our policy forbids collecting IMEI/IMSI for visitors.
Errata and false positives: sample PAN AAAAA0000A and CIN L00000ZZ0000PLC000000 in training screenshots are invalid/dummy and should not be stored as customer data.
Escalations should go to pit.office@nivyattech.in and the DPO; maintain an Insider List per SEBI guidance, with role-only entries (e.g., CFO) until named appointments are confirmed.
